name: Cherry Glazed Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the ham.
2. Thirty minutes before the end of baking, remove the ham from the oven.
3. Pour off any drippings from the pan.
4. Score the fat surface lightly in a uniform diamond pattern.
5. Strain the pie filling and set aside the cherries.
6. Stir together the syrup from the pie filling, marmalade, Sherry flavoring, and orange juice to make the glaze.
7. Pour the glaze mixture over the ham.
8. Continue baking for 30 minutes longer or until the ham is cooked through, basting frequently with the glaze.
9. Garnish the ham with the reserved cherries.
